---
title: "Haustoria TRAP-seq H Index"
author: "Iliana Castillo-Machuca | Virginia Tech SPES"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:  # Creates HTML (not PDF/Word)
    toc: true # Table of contents (clickable headers)
    toc_float: true # TOC floats/stays visible when scrolling
    toc_depth: 3 # Headers 1-3 included in TOC (#### excluded)  
    code_folding: hide # Collapse code chunks (click to expand)
    theme: flatly  # Clean dark theme (vs 'default', 'cerulean')
    highlight: tango # Code syntax colors (vs 'default', 'zenburn')
    df_print: paged # Data frames = paginated tables (vs 'kable')
---

## 1.Clean Environment
```{r CLEAN-ENVIRONMENT}
  ######################### CLEAN ENVIRONMENT   ######################### 
rm(list = ls(all.names = TRUE)) # Remove all objects from the workspace
gc()  # Garbage collection to free memory

options(
  max.print = 1e5,  #Reasonable cap to avoid massive console dumps
  scipen = 0, # Use scientific notation
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, # Keep strings as character by default
  dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE, # Suppress dplyr's summaries
  digits = 3 # Number of digits when printing
  )

  ######################### PROJECT INFO  ######################### 
info <- list(
  Title = "SPLIT-GFP TRAP: HAUSTORIAL ESTIMATION + ANALYSIS",
  R_Version = R.version$version.string,
  Working_Directory = getwd(),
  Timestamp = format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))

separator <- strrep("=", 80)
cat("\n", separator, "\n", info$Title, "\n", separator, "\n")
cat("R Version:", info$R_Version, "\n")
cat("Working Directory:", info$Working_Directory, "\n")
cat("Timestamp:", info$Timestamp, "\n\n")

## Optional: show session info for reproducibility
# sessionInfo()
```

## 2. Install & Load Packages
```{r Packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
  ######################### LOAD REQ PACKAGES  ######################### 
required_packages <- c(
  "tidyverse", # dplyr, ggplot2, tidyr, purrr, stringr, readr
  "readxl", # Import Excel files
  "DESeq2",  # Differential expression analysis
  "patchwork", # Combine multiple ggplot objects
  "ggrepel", # Add non-overlapping text labels to ggplot2
  "scales", # Axis transformations, formatting (percentages, log scales, breaks)
  "pheatmap", # Clustered heatmaps
  "EnhancedVolcano", # Volcano plots for DE results
  "AnnotationDbi", # Gene annotation framework
  "org.At.tair.db", # Arabidopsis thaliana annotations
  "clusterProfiler", # GO/KEGG enrichment analysis and GSEA
  "enrichplot", # Visualization of enrichment results
  "vidger", # RNA-seq vis helpers 
  "RColorBrewer"
)
  ######################### INSTALL MISSING PACKAGES  ######################### 
# new_packages <- required_packages[!(required_packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"])]
# if (length(new_packages)) {
#   install.packages(new_packages)
# }

# Load packages quietly
load_ok <- sapply(
  required_packages,
  function(pkg) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(
      require(pkg, character.only = TRUE, quietly = TRUE)
    )
  }
)
if (!all(load_ok)) {
  warning("Failed to load packages: ",
          paste(required_packages[!load_ok], collapse = ", "))
}

  ######################### SET WORKING DIRECTORY  ######################### 
cat("Working directory:", getwd(), "\n")
```

## 3. Establish Directories
```{r Directories}
  ######################### SET OUTPUT DIRECTORY  ######################### 
graphics_dir <- file.path("Results/Graphics")
tables_dir   <- file.path("Results/Tables") 
procdata_dir <- file.path("Results/Processed_data")

dirs <- c(graphics_dir, tables_dir, procdata_dir)
# Create directories if they don't exist
invisible(
  sapply(
    dirs,
    function(d) {
      if (!dir.exists(d)) {
        dir.create(d, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
      }
    }
  )
)
## Print confirmation
cat("Directories ready:\n")
cat("- Graphics: ", graphics_dir, "\n")
cat("- Tables:   ", tables_dir, "\n")
cat("- Proc:     ", procdata_dir, "\n")
```

## 4. Load Files
```{r Load-Files}
  ######################### LOAD GFP ALIGNMENTS  ######################### 
gfp1_9_summary  <- read_tsv("../Bowtie/GFP1_9_mapping_summary.tsv")
gfp10_11_summary <- read_tsv("../Bowtie/GFP10_11_mapping_summary.tsv")

  ######################### LOAD featureCounts WHOLE GENOME ALIGNMENT ######################### 
featcount <- read_tsv("../HvIM/Data_Repository/featcount.txt", skip = 1)
count_cols <- colnames(featcount)[7:ncol(featcount)]
read.count <- featcount %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(count_cols)) %>%
  as.matrix()
rownames(read.count) <- featcount[[1]]

  ## Checks
stopifnot(!anyDuplicated(rownames(read.count)))
stopifnot(is.numeric(read.count[1, ]))
```

## 5. Clean Data
```{r Clean-Data}
  ######################### CLEAN NAMES  ######################### 
colnames(read.count) <- gsub(".*\\/|\\..*Aligned.*", "", colnames(read.count)) # Strip names

sample_names <- c(
  "IT-107","IT-108","IT-109","IT-110",
  "H-107","H-108","H-109","H-110","H-111",
  "UT-106","UT-108","UT-114",
  "IT-206","IT-207","IT-208","IT-209",
  "IM-206","IM-207","IM-208","IM-209","IM-210",
  "UT-204","UT-208","UT-213","UT-214",
  "UM-204","UM-208","UM-213","UM-214","UM-215")
stopifnot(
  length(sample_names) == ncol(read.count),
  nrow(gfp1_9_summary) == length(sample_names),
  nrow(gfp10_11_summary) == length(sample_names))

colnames(read.count) <- sample_names
gfp1_9_summary$sample_id  <- sample_names
gfp10_11_summary$sample_id <- sample_names
cat("Counts:", nrow(read.count), "genes x", ncol(read.count), "samples\n")

  ######################### METADATA  ######################### 
sample_info <- tibble(sample_id = colnames(read.count)) %>%
  mutate(
    extraction = if_else(str_detect(sample_id, "^(H|IM|UM)-"), "TRAP", "CLE"),
    Group = case_when(
      str_detect(sample_id, "^H-")  ~ "H",
      str_detect(sample_id, "^IM-") ~ "IM",
      str_detect(sample_id, "^UM-") ~ "UM",
      str_detect(sample_id, "^IT-") ~ "IT",
      str_detect(sample_id, "^UT-") ~ "UT",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_),  
    Condition = factor(c(rep("Infected",10), rep("Uninfected",5), rep("Infected",8), rep("Uninfected", 7))),
    line = case_when(
      str_detect(sample_id, "^H-") ~ "DMR6pPETEp",
      str_detect(sample_id, "^(IM|UM)-") ~ "35SpPETEp",
      TRUE ~ "bulk"))

sample_info$Group <- factor(sample_info$Group, levels = c("UM","UT","IM","IT","H")) # Constrast ordering/ should UT be first?

sample_info <- as.data.frame(sample_info)
rownames(sample_info) <- sample_info$sample_id

## Check
stopifnot(all(rownames(sample_info) == colnames(read.count)))
print(table(sample_info$Group, sample_info$extraction))

  ######################### WRITE EXCEL  ######################### 
writexl::write_xlsx(gfp1_9_summary, file.path(tables_dir, "gfp1_9_summary.xlsx"))
writexl::write_xlsx(gfp10_11_summary, file.path(tables_dir, "gfp10_11_summary.xlsx"))

  ######################### SUBSET H IM UM  ######################### 
subset_groups <- function(df) df %>% filter(str_detect(sample_id, "^(H|IM|UM)-"))
gfp1_9_h_im_um  <- subset_groups(gfp1_9_summary)
gfp10_11_h_im_um <- subset_groups(gfp10_11_summary)

subset_info <- function(sample_info) sample_info %>% filter(str_detect(sample_id, "^(H|IM|UM)-"))
HvUMvIM_info <- subset_info(sample_info)

  ## SET Up For Estimation
#TRAP Only
trap_cols <- grep("^(H|IM|UM)-", colnames(read.count), value = TRUE)
stopifnot(length(trap_cols) > 0)
trap.count <- read.count[, trap_cols, drop = FALSE]
genome_total_reads <- colSums(trap.count)
```

## 6. Colors
```{r Colors}
colors <- c("H"="blue", "IM"="hotpink", "UM"="black", "UT"="lightgreen", "IT"="purple")
```

## 7. RAW QC GFP
```{r GFP Raw Counts}
######################### PREPARE DATA  ######################### 
  ## Join Metadata
gfp1_9_h_im_um <- gfp1_9_h_im_um %>% left_join(HvUMvIM_info %>% select(sample_id, Group = Group, Condition = Condition), by = "sample_id")

gfp10_11_h_im_um <- gfp10_11_h_im_um %>% left_join(HvUMvIM_info %>% select(sample_id, Group = Group, Condition = Condition), by = "sample_id")

######################### FRACTION OF TRAP READS   ######################### 
# Compute GFP fractions
gfp1_9_h_im_um <- gfp1_9_h_im_um %>%
  mutate (gfp_frac = GFP1_9_mapped_reads / total_reads)

  ######################### UM BACKGROUND  ######################### 
UM_bg <- gfp1_9_h_im_um %>%
  filter(Group == "UM") %>%
  summarise(bg = mean(gfp_frac, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(bg)

  ######################### H = DMR6 REF   ######################### 
H_ref <- gfp1_9_h_im_um %>%
  filter(Group == "H") %>%
  summarise(ref = mean(gfp_frac, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(ref)
stopifnot(!is.na(UM_bg), !is.na(H_ref), H_ref > 0)

  ######################### IM CORRECTION  ######################### 
im_haust <- gfp1_9_h_im_um %>%
  filter(Group == "IM") %>%
  mutate(haust_index = pmax((gfp_frac - UM_bg) / H_ref, 0),  # IM correction: haustorial index relative to H, after subtracting UM background
    haust_pct  = haust_index * 100)
 
  ## PLOT
ggplot(im_haust, aes(x = sample_id, y = haust_index, fill = Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray30") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", size = 0.8) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 3)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "top") +
  labs(title = "Estimated Haustorial Signal in IM Samples",
    x = "Sample",
    y = "Haustorial Signal (relative to H)"
  )
ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "IM_Raw_vs_UMCorrected_Fractions.png"), width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)


im_haust <- gfp1_9_h_im_um %>%
  filter(Group == "IM") %>%
  mutate(
    # Proportional haustorial contribution (0 = none, 1 = same as H)
    haust_alpha = pmax((gfp_frac - UM_bg) / (H_ref - UM_bg), 0),
    # Express as percentage
    haust_pct   = haust_alpha * 100
  )

######################### VIEW RESULTS #########################

im_haust %>%
  select(sample_id, gfp_frac, haust_alpha, haust_pct)
```


```{r GFP Raw Counts}
library(ggplot2)

######################### PLOT HAUSTORIAL CONTRIBUTION #########################

ggplot(im_haust, aes(x = sample_id, y = haust_pct)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#1f78b4") +                  # bar plot
  geom_hline(yintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Estimated Haustorial Contribution in IM Samples",
    x = "Sample",
    y = "Haustorial Signal (%)",
    caption = "Dashed line = H reference (100%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
  )

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

######################### PREPARE DATA FOR PLOTTING #########################


# Estimate haustorial contribution for IM
im_haust <- gfp1_9_h_im_um %>%
  filter(Group == "IM") %>%
  mutate(
    haust_alpha = pmax((gfp_frac - UM_bg) / (H_ref - UM_bg), 0),
    haust_pct   = haust_alpha * 100
  )

library(ggplot2)

# Create a summary data frame for plotting
plot_data <- data.frame(
  sample_id = c("IM-206","IM-207","IM-208","IM-209","IM-210"),
  haust_pct = c(0.00, 6.69, 0.00, 0.00, 0.00),
  Group     = "IM"
)

# Add reference points for UM and H
ref_data <- data.frame(
  sample_id = c("UM","H"),
  haust_pct = c(0, 100),
  Group     = c("UM","H")
)

plot_data <- rbind(plot_data, ref_data)

# Boxplot / barplot
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = sample_id, y = haust_pct, fill = Group)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("UM"="#a6cee3","IM"="#1f78b4","H"="#b2df8a")) +
  labs(
    title = "Estimated Haustorial Contribution in IM Samples",
    x = "Sample",
    y = "Haustorial Signal (%)",
    fill = "Group",
    caption = "UM = 0% (background), H = 100% (reference)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
  )
```

## 8. H INDEX
```{r}
######################### H INDEX ACROSS SAMPLES   ######################### 
# H per sample reference and mean
h_ref_per_sample <- gfp1_9_h_im_um %>%
  filter(Group == "H") %>%
  select(sample_id, gfp_frac)

  ######################### ATTACH H INDEX   ######################### 
all_haust_norm <- gfp1_9_h_im_um %>%
  left_join(
    im_haust %>% select(sample_id, im_haust_index = haust_index),
    by = "sample_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(haust_index = case_when(
      Group == "UM" ~ gfp_frac / H_ref, # UM relative to mean H
      Group == "IM" ~ im_haust_index, # background-corrected IM
      Group == "H"  ~ gfp_frac / H_ref, # H ~ 1 on average
      TRUE ~ NA_real_),
    # Label only >1x H for readability
    label = ifelse(haust_index > 1, paste0(round(haust_index * 100), "%"), NA))

## PLOT
p_all_haust <- ggplot(all_haust_norm, aes(x = sample_id, y = haust_index, fill = Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", size = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, max(all_haust_norm$haust_index, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "top") +
  labs(
    title = "Haustorial Index Across All Conditions (Normalized to H)",
    y = "Haustorial Index (relative to mean H)",
    x = "Sample"
  )
ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "Haustorial_Index_AllConditions.png"),
       p_all_haust, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)


  ######################### GFP 1-9 Mapped Fraction Per Sample and Condition   ######################### 
p_gfp_frac_by_sample <- ggplot(gfp1_9_h_im_um, aes(x = sample_id, y = gfp_frac, fill = Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.6, position = "dodge") +
geom_hline(yintercept = H_ref, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "top") +
  labs(title = "GFP1-9 Mapped Fraction by Condition",
       subtitle = "IM background-corrected for UM; H = reference haustoria fraction",
       x = "Sample",
       y = "Mapped Fraction")
ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "GFP_FractionByCondition.png"), width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)


## Jittered Overview
p_gfp_frac_by_cond <- ggplot(gfp1_9_h_im_um,
       aes(x = Group, y = gfp_frac, color = Group)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = UM_bg,
             linetype = "dotted", color = "gray30", size = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = H_ref,
             linetype = "dashed", color = "red", size = 0.9) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  labs(
    title = "GFP1–9 Mapped Fraction Across TRAP Samples",
    subtitle = "Dotted line = UM background; dashed line = H reference",
    x = "Condition",
    y = "GFP1–9 Mapped Fraction"
  ) + 
geom_text_repel(aes(label = sample_id), size = 3)
ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "UMbg_Href.png"), width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## 9. TRAP Count H Correction
```{r}
  ######################### JOINING   ######################### 
trap_long <- trap.count %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("gene_id") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    -gene_id,
    names_to = "sample_id",
    values_to = "raw_counts"
  ) %>%
  # Add sample info
  left_join(gfp1_9_h_im_um %>% select(sample_id, Group, Condition, total_reads), by = "sample_id") %>%
  # Add IM haust fractions
  left_join(im_haust %>% select(sample_id, haust_index), by = "sample_id")

stopifnot(all(c("gene_id","sample_id","raw_counts","Group") %in% colnames(trap_long)))

  #########################  PER GENE UM BACKGROUND (mean counts across UM reps)   ######################### 
gene_um_bg <- trap_long %>% 
  filter(Group == "UM") %>%
  group_by(gene_id) %>%
  summarise(um_mean = mean(raw_counts, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


  ######################### GENE LEVEL H CORRECTION   ######################### 
trap_corrected <- trap_long %>%
  # Join per-gene UM background
  left_join(gene_um_bg, by = "gene_id") %>%
  mutate(
    # UM-corrected haustorial counts
    haust_gene_counts = case_when( 
      Group == "IM" ~ pmax((raw_counts - um_mean) * haust_index, 0), # Corrected + scaled by haust fraction
      Group == "H" ~ pmax(raw_counts - um_mean, 0), # UM background only
      TRUE ~ raw_counts # UM stays raw
    )
  )

# Example genes: peek at correction
example_genes <- c("AT1G01010", "AT1G01080")
trap_corrected %>%
  filter(gene_id %in% example_genes,
         Group %in% c("UM", "IM", "H")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(sample_id, haust_gene_counts, fill = Group)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ gene_id, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "top") +
  labs(
    x = "Sample",
    y = "Estimated haustorial TRAP counts",
    fill = "Group"
  )
```

## 10. Matrix and DESeq Run
```{r DESeq2}
######################### CORRECTED COUNT MATRIX FOR DESEQ2   ######################### 
trap_matrix <- trap_corrected %>%
  filter(sample_id != "IM-207" )  %>% # supposedly this doesn't pass my filters
  select(gene_id, sample_id, haust_gene_counts) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = sample_id,
    values_from = haust_gene_counts,
    values_fill = 0   # replace missing values with 0
  ) %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_id") %>%
  as.matrix()

## Sample info basically
coldata <- trap_corrected %>%
    filter(sample_id != "IM-207" )  %>%
  select(sample_id, Group, Condition) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  column_to_rownames("sample_id")

stopifnot(all(colnames(trap_matrix) == rownames(coldata)))
cat("Corrected matrix:", nrow(trap_matrix), "genes x", ncol(trap_matrix), "samples\n")
print(table(coldata$Group))

  ######################### RUN DESEQ  ######################### 
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = round(trap_matrix),
  colData   = coldata,
  design    = ~ Group)

dds <- dds[rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10, ] # Prefilter low counts
cat("After prefilter:", nrow(dds), "genes\n")

dds$Group <- relevel(dds$Group, ref = "UM")
dds <- DESeq(dds, sfType = "poscounts") # Good for sparse corrected data

cat("Size factors:", round(sizeFactors(dds), 3), "\n")

saveRDS(dds, file.path(procdata_dir, "dds_H_index.rds"))

  ######################### RESULTS   ######################### 
res_H_vs_UM <- results(dds, contrast = c("Group", "H", "UM"),
        lfcThreshold = 1,
        altHypothesis = "greaterAbs")
res_IM_vs_UM <- results(dds, contrast = c("Group", "IM", "UM"),
        lfcThreshold = 1,
        altHypothesis = "greaterAbs")
```

## 11. DESEQ Results
```{r}
  #########################  CLEAN RESULTS + TABLES   ######################### 
res_H_vs_UM <- as.data.frame(res_H_vs_UM) %>%
  rownames_to_column("gene_id") %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  filter(!is.na(padj))

res_IM_vs_UM <- as.data.frame(res_IM_vs_UM) %>%
  rownames_to_column("gene_id") %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  filter(!is.na(padj))

cat("H vs UM:", sum(res_H_vs_UM$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "DE genes at padj < 0.05\n")
cat("IM vs UM:", sum(res_IM_vs_UM$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "DE genes at padj < 0.05\n")
```

## 12. VOLCANO PLOTS
```{r}
  #########################  VOLCANO PLOTS   #########################  
# H vs UM volcano
EnhancedVolcano(res_H_vs_UM,
  lab = res_H_vs_UM$gene_id,
  x = "log2FoldChange",
  y = "padj",
  pCutoff = 0.05,
  FCcutoff = 1,
  pointSize = 1.5,
  labSize = 3,
  title = "H vs UM (haustoria-enriched)",
  subtitle = paste("Total DE:", sum(res_H_vs_UM$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)),
  caption = "Haustoria-corrected TRAP-seq")
ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "Volcano_H_vs_UM.png"), width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# IM vs UM volcano  
EnhancedVolcano(res_IM_vs_UM,
  lab = res_IM_vs_UM$gene_id,
  x = "log2FoldChange",
  y = "padj",
  pCutoff = 0.05,
  FCcutoff = 1,
  pointSize = 1.5,
  labSize = 3,
  title = "IM vs UM (infection response, corrected)",
  subtitle = paste("Total DE:", sum(res_IM_vs_UM$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)),
  caption = "Haustoria-corrected TRAP-seq")
ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "Volcano_IM_vs_UM.png"), width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

## Write Results
writexl::write_xlsx(list(
  "H_vs_UM" = res_H_vs_UM,
  "IM_vs_UM" = res_IM_vs_UM), 
  file.path(tables_dir, "DESeq2_Results_HaustoriaCorrected.xlsx"))
```

## 13. VST NORMALIZATION
```{r VST NORM}
#########################  VST   #########################  
## Variance stabilizing transformation
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = FALSE, nsub = 1000)  # blind ignores design; subsample for speed

## Sample names, match to colData
colnames(vsd) <- rownames(coldata)
stopifnot(all(colnames(vsd) == rownames(colData(dds))))  # Check

## Normalized counts matrix (size factors applied)
norm_counts <- counts(dds, normalized = TRUE)

cat("VST dims:", nrow(vsd), "genes ×", ncol(vsd), "samples\n")
cat("Norm counts dims:", nrow(norm_counts), "×", ncol(norm_counts), "\n")

## EXPORT
write_csv(as.data.frame(norm_counts), 
          file.path(tables_dir, "normalized_counts_H_IM_UM.csv"))

writexl::write_xlsx(
  list(
    Normalized = as.data.frame(round(norm_counts, 2)),  # Round for readability
    VST        = as.data.frame(assay(vsd))), 
  path = file.path(tables_dir, "H_IM_UM_normalized_VST.xlsx"))
cat("✅ Exported Normalized + VST matrices to Tables/\n")

## Enhanced quality checks
summary(colSums(assay(vsd)))  # VST lib sizes should be ~equal (~1e6 range)

## Better visualization
boxplot(log2(assay(vsd)[1:25, ] + 1), 
        main = "VST Top 25 Genes by Sample", 
        las = 2, cex.axis = 0.8)
#warning, NaNs produced
```

## 14. PCA AND PLOT
```{r PCA}
#########################  PCA PLOT   #########################  
pca_data <- DESeq2::plotPCA(vsd, 
                           intgroup = c("Group", "Condition"), 
                           returnData = TRUE)
percentVar <- round(100 * attr(pca_data, "percentVar"))

#
p_pca <- ggplot(pca_data, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Group, shape = Condition)) +
  geom_point(size = 4.5, stroke = 1.5, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Tissue") +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")) +
  ggtitle("Haustoria-corrected TRAP-seq PCA") +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = name),                 
                  box.padding = 0.35, 
                  max.overlaps = Inf,  # Show all labels
                  size = 3.5, 
                  segment.color = "red",
                  segment.size = 0.3,
                  bg.color = "white", 
                  bg.r = 0.1) +
  labs(title = "TRAP-seq PCA: Haustoria vs Corrected Mesophyll (VST)",
       subtitle = paste("PC1:", round(percentVar[1],1), "% variance |",
                       "PC2:", round(percentVar[2],1), "% variance"),
       caption = "Groups: UM (uninfected mesophyll), IM (infected mesophyll), H (haustoria)") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", 
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "PCA_HaustoriaCorrected.png"), p_pca, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## 15. LFC SHRINKAGE
```{r LFC SHRINKAGE}
#########################  PARAMETERS   #########################  
pad <- 0.05
lfc <- 1
#########################  LFC SHRINKAGE   #########################  
## LFC shrinkage (apeglm, more accurate for rankings)
lfc_H_UM <- tryCatch({lfcShrink(dds, coef = "Group_H_vs_UM", type = "apeglm")}, 
error = function(e) {warning("apeglm failed for H_vs_UM, using normal: ", e$message)
  lfcShrink(dds, contrast = c("condition", "H", "UM"), type = "normal")})

lfc_IM_UM <- tryCatch({lfcShrink(dds, coef = "Group_IM_vs_UM", type = "apeglm")}, 
error = function(e) {warning("apeglm failed for IM_vs_UM, using normal: ", e$message)
  lfcShrink(dds, contrast = c("condition", "IM", "UM"), type = "normal")})

format_lfc <- function(lfc_obj, contrast_name) {
  lfc_obj %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column("TAIR") %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    filter(!is.na(padj)) %>%
    mutate(
      contrast = contrast_name,
      significant = padj < pad & abs(log2FoldChange) >= lfc,
      direction = case_when(
        significant & log2FoldChange >=  lfc ~ "UP",
        significant & log2FoldChange <= -lfc ~ "DOWN",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    )
}

deg_H  <- format_lfc(lfc_H_UM,  "H_vs_UM")
deg_IM <- format_lfc(lfc_IM_UM, "IM_vs_UM")

count_summary <- tibble(
  contrast = c("H_vs_UM", "IM_vs_UM"),
  total_genes = c(nrow(deg_H), nrow(deg_IM)),
  n_sig = c(sum(deg_H$significant), sum(deg_IM$significant)),
  n_up = c(sum(deg_H$direction == "UP"), sum(deg_IM$direction == "UP")),
  n_down = c(sum(deg_H$direction == "DOWN"), sum(deg_IM$direction == "DOWN"))
)
print(count_summary)

sig_H  <- deg_H  %>% filter(significant)
sig_IM <- deg_IM %>% filter(significant)
shared_genes <- intersect(sig_H$TAIR, sig_IM$TAIR)
haustoria_specific <- setdiff(sig_H$TAIR, sig_IM$TAIR)

cat("Shared DE genes:", length(shared_genes), "\n")
cat("H-specific genes:", length(haustoria_specific), "\n")

# Set up for excel
deg_workbook <- list(
  H_vs_UM_All   = deg_H,
  H_vs_UM_UP    = deg_H  %>% filter(direction == "UP"),
  H_vs_UM_DOWN  = deg_H  %>% filter(direction == "DOWN"),
  IM_vs_UM_All  = deg_IM,
  IM_vs_UM_UP   = deg_IM %>% filter(direction == "UP"),
  IM_vs_UM_DOWN = deg_IM %>% filter(direction == "DOWN"),
  Shared        = deg_H %>% filter(TAIR %in% shared_genes)
)
writexl::write_xlsx(deg_workbook, file.path(tables_dir,  "H_EST_DE_genes_clean.xlsx"))
```

```{r}
if(length(shared_genes) > 0) {
  shared_genes <- intersect(shared_genes, rownames(vsd))
  deg_mat <- assay(vsd)[shared_genes, ]
  ann_col <- data.frame(Group = coldata$Group)
  rownames(ann_col) <- colnames(deg_mat)

heat_colors <- colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")))(100)

#PHEATMAP
p_deg <- pheatmap(deg_mat,
      scale = "row",  # Z-score per gene for DE visualization
      color = heat_colors,  # Explicit namespace
      cluster_rows = TRUE, 
      cluster_cols = TRUE,
      clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
      clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
      clustering_method = "complete",
      annotation_col = ann_col,
      show_rownames = ifelse(length(shared_genes) < 30, TRUE, FALSE),
      show_colnames = FALSE,
      main = paste("Top", length(shared_genes), "Shared DE Genes\n(padj<0.05, |LFC|≥1: IM & H vs UM)"),
      fontsize_row = 8,
      filename = file.path(graphics_dir, "heatmap_top_shared_DE_genes.png"),
      width = 12, height = 10
    )
}
plotDispEsts(dds)
summary(deg_H$log2FoldChange)
summary(deg_IM$log2FoldChange)
sizeFactors(dds)
sum(deg_H$log2FoldChange > 1)
sum(deg_H$log2FoldChange < -1)
hist(deg_H$log2FoldChange, breaks = 100)

colMeans(counts(dds, normalized=TRUE))

```


```{r}
  #########################  GO (H vs UM upregulated)   #########################  
haustoria_up <- deg_H %>%
  filter(direction == "UP") %>%
  pull(TAIR)

if(length(haustoria_up) > 0) {
  ego <- enrichGO(
    gene      = haustoria_up,
    OrgDb     = org.At.tair.db,
    keyType   = 'TAIR',
    ont       = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    qvalueCutoff = 0.05
  )
  
  if(!is.null(ego) && nrow(ego) > 0) {
    dotplot(ego, showCategory = 20) +
      ggtitle("GO Biological Process: Haustoria-enriched genes")
    
    ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "GO_HaustoriaEnriched.png"), width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    write.csv(as.data.frame(ego), file.path(tables_dir, "GO_HaustoriaEnriched.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  }
}


#########################  MA PLOTS   #########################  
plotMA(lfc_H_UM, main = "H vs UM", ylim = c(-3, 3))
ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "MAplot_H_vs_UM.png"), width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

plotMA(lfc_IM_UM, main = "IM vs UM", ylim = c(-3, 3))
ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "MAplot_IM_vs_UM.png"), width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```



```{r}
library(fgsea)
library(enrichplot)
#########################  GSEA   ######################### 
# Ranked gene list for GSEA
# Use H_vs_UM by shrunken LFC
gsea_df <- deg_H %>%
  select(TAIR, log2FoldChange) %>%
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange))
  

# Map TAIR -> ENTREZ
entrez_map <- mapIds(
  org.At.tair.db,
  keys = gsea_df$TAIR,
  column = "ENTREZID",
  keytype = "TAIR",
  multiVals = "first"
)

gsea_df$ENTREZID <- entrez_map
gsea_df <- gsea_df %>% filter(!is.na(ENTREZID))


gene_list <- gsea_df$log2FoldChange
names(gene_list) <- gsea_df$ENTREZID
gene_list <- sort(gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)

# Run GSEA
gse <- gseGO(
  geneList     = gene_list,
  OrgDb        = org.At.tair.db,
  keyType      = "ENTREZID",
  ont          = "BP",
  minGSSize    = 10,
  maxGSSize    = 500,
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  verbose      = FALSE
)


if (!is.null(gse) && nrow(gse@result) > 0) {
  gseaplot2(gse, geneSetID = 1:5)
  
  ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "GSEA_H_vs_UM.png"),
         width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  
  write.csv(as.data.frame(gse),
            file.path(tables_dir, "GSEA_H_vs_UM.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
}
```


```{r}
kegg <- enrichKEGG(
  gene         = gsea_df$TAIR,
  organism     = "ath",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  qvalueCutoff  = 0.05
)
if (!is.null(kegg) && nrow(as.data.frame(kegg)) > 0) {

head(kegg, 10)

  as.data.frame(kegg)[, c("ID", "Description", "p.adjust", "qvalue", "Count")]

  dotplot(kegg, showCategory = 15) +
    ggtitle("KEGG Enrichment – Haustoriated Cells")

  ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "KEGG_H_vs_UM.png"),
         width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

  write.csv(as.data.frame(kegg),
            file.path(tables_dir, "KEGG_haustoriated_enrichment.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
}

# H upregulated only
H_up <- deg_H %>%
  filter(direction == "UP") %>%
  pull(TAIR)

H_up_entrez <- mapIds(org.At.tair.db,
                      keys = H_up,
                      column = "ENTREZID",
                      keytype = "TAIR",
                      multiVals = "first") %>%
                na.omit()

# IM upregulated only
IM_up <- deg_IM %>%
  filter(direction == "UP") %>%
  pull(TAIR)

IM_up_entrez <- mapIds(org.At.tair.db,
                       keys = IM_up,
                       column = "ENTREZID",
                       keytype = "TAIR",
                       multiVals = "first") %>%
                 na.omit()

kegg_compare <- compareCluster(
  geneCluster = list(H_up = H_up_entrez,
                     IM_up = IM_up_entrez),
  fun = "enrichKEGG",
  organism = "ath",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.1  # loosen threshold to inspect signal
)

kegg_compare
kegg_H <- enrichKEGG(gene = H_up_entrez,
                     organism = "ath",
                     pvalueCutoff = 0.1)

kegg_IM <- enrichKEGG(gene = IM_up_entrez,
                      organism = "ath",
                      pvalueCutoff = 0.1)

kegg_H
kegg_IM

```

```{r}

FW_df <- vsFourWay(
  x = "H",
  y = "IM",
  control = "UM",
  data = dds,               
  d.factor = "Group",
  type = "deseq",
  padj = 0.05,
  lfc = 1,
  title = TRUE,
  grid = TRUE,
  legend = TRUE,
  data.return = TRUE,
  xaxis.text.size = 10,
  yaxis.text.size = 10
)


print(FW_df$plot)  # View plot
ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "FourWay.png"), 
       FW_df$plot, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
pvalueCutoff = pad
qvalueCutoff = pad

## Extract Genes
df_four <- FW_df$data
green_genes <- df_four %>%
  filter(color == "green") %>%
  pull(id)

length(green_genes)  # Count
head(green_genes, 20)

# All sig DEGs (blue + green)
sig_genes <- df_four %>%
  filter(isDE_all == TRUE) %>%
  pull(id)


## EXPORT
write_csv(tibble(Gene = green_genes), 
          file.path(tables_dir, "vidger_green_genes.csv"))
writexl::write_xlsx(tibble(Gene = green_genes), 
          file.path(tables_dir, "vidger_green_genes.xlsx"))
write_csv(df_four %>% filter(color == "green"), 
          file.path(tables_dir, "vidger_green_detailed.csv"))
writexl::write_xlsx(df_four %>% filter(color == "green"), 
          file.path(tables_dir, "vidger_green_detailed.xlsx"))

## Top-right: Strong H UP (logFC_x > 2), weak IM (logFC_y ≈ 0)
pure_haustoria <- df_four %>%
 filter(
  padj_x < pad,
  padj_y >= pad,
  logFC_x > 1,
  abs(logFC_y) < 0.5) %>%
  arrange(desc(logFC_x)) %>%   # Rank by H strength
  pull(id)

length(pure_haustoria)
head(pure_haustoria, 15)

pure_df <- df_four %>%
  filter(id %in% pure_haustoria) %>%
  dplyr::select(id, logFC_x, logFC_y, padj_x, padj_y) %>%
  arrange(desc(logFC_x))

write_csv(pure_df, file.path(tables_dir, "pure_haustoria_H_specific.csv"))
writexl::write_xlsx(pure_df, 
          file.path(tables_dir, "pure_haustoria_H_specific.xlsx"))

# Validate overlap with H_UP
h_up_overlap <- intersect(pure_haustoria, H_UP$TAIR)
length(h_up_overlap) / length(pure_haustoria)

## GO BP
ego_pureH <- enrichGO(
  gene = pure_haustoria,
  OrgDb = org.At.tair.db,
  keyType = "TAIR",
  ont = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 1, 
  qvalueCutoff = 1,
  minGSSize = 5
)

## Color by raw pvalue (ALL terms)
p1 <- dotplot(ego_pureH, 
              showCategory = 10,  # ↓ from 25
              label_format = 30,  # Truncate long labels
              font.size = 10) +   # Smaller text
  scale_color_gradient(low = "red", high = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Pure Haustoria GO BP (Top 10)") +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))  # Tighter y-axis
print(p1)

ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "pure_haustoria_GO_pvalue.png"), p1, width=12, height=10)
```

```{r}
## KEGG
entrez <- bitr(pure_haustoria, from="TAIR", to="ENTREZID", OrgDb=org.At.tair.db) %>% distinct(ENTREZID)

kegg_pureH <- enrichKEGG(
  gene = pure_haustoria,
  organism = "ath",
  keyType = "kegg",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05
)

kegg_df <- kegg_pureH@result %>%
  mutate(
    GeneRatio_num = as.numeric(sub("/.*", "", GeneRatio)) /
                    as.numeric(sub(".*/", "", GeneRatio))
  ) %>% arrange(pvalue) %>% slice_head(n = 20)

stopifnot(nrow(kegg_df) > 0)

## PLOT
ggplot(kegg_df,
       aes(x = GeneRatio_num,
           y = reorder(Description, GeneRatio_num),
           size = Count,
           color = p.adjust)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_continuous(low = "red", high = "blue") +
  labs(
    title = "Pure Haustoria KEGG Pathways",
    x = "Gene Ratio",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw()

ggsave(file.path(graphics_dir, "pure_haustoria_KEGG_pvalue.png"), width=12, height=10)

```


```{r}
#cor_results <- plot_df %>%
#  group_by(gene_id) %>%
#  summarise(cor_haust = cor(norm_count, haust_frac, method = "spearman"))

#cor_stats <- p %>%
#  group_by(gene_id) %>%
#  summarise(
#    spearman_r = cor(haust_frac, norm_count, method = "spearman"),
#    .groups = "drop"
#  )
#cor_results
#summary_df <- top_genes %>%
#  select(gene_symbol, log2FoldChange, padj) %>%
#  left_join(cor_results, by = c("gene_symbol" = "gene_id"))
```

```{r Maybe look at other markers?}
# Define H samples by name
#h_samples <- grep("H-", colnames(vsd), value=TRUE)

# Get markers
#markers <- rownames(res_H_UM)[res_H_UM$padj < 0.05 & 
#                             res_H_UM$log2FoldChange > 1 &
#                             rowSums(assay(vsd)[,h_samples]) > 50]

#head(sort(res_H_UM$log2FoldChange[res_H_UM$padj < 0.01], decreasing = TRUE), 20)

# Top 50 haustoria markers (highest log2FC)
#top_markers <- rownames(res_H_UM)[order(res_H_UM$log2FoldChange, decreasing = TRUE)[1:50]]

# H vs IM scale factors using top 50
#h_means <- colMeans(assay(vsd)[top_markers, h_samples])
#im_idx <- grep("IM-", colnames(vsd), value=TRUE)
#im_means <- colMeans(assay(vsd)[top_markers, im_idx])

#h_fractions <- (im_means / h_means) * 100
#plot(h_means, im_means, pch=19, main="H Fraction Estimation")
#abline(0,1,col="red",lwd=2)
#text(h_means, im_means, names(h_fractions), pos=3)

#print(h_fractions)  # H estimates!


#plot(h_means, im_means, pch=19, cex=1.5,
#     xlab="H marker mean", ylab="IM marker mean",
#     main="85% Haustoria in IM ✓")
#abline(0, 0.85, col="red", lwd=3)  #  fit line
#text(im_means, h_means, names(h_fractions), pos=3)


# haustoria genes
#haustoria_genes <- c(
#  "AT5G24530",  # DMR6 
#  "AT2G14610",  # PR1
#  "AT3G04720",  # PR2 
#  "AT4G02380",  # PR5
#  "AT1G57520",  # CYP81D8
#  "AT2G38470"   # WRKY33
#)


#haustoria_genes <- intersect(haustoria_genes, rownames(rld_trap))
#cat("Using", length(haustoria_genes), "markers\n")

#h_mat   <- assay(rld_trap)[haustoria_genes, , drop = FALSE]
#h_index <- colMeans(h_mat)

#sample_info_trap <- sample_info[trap_samples, ]
#sample_info_trap$h_index <- h_index


#keep_um <- sample_info_trap$trt == "UM"  # Pure mock mesophyll
#h_um_baseline <- mean(sample_info_trap$h_index[keep_um])

#h_summary_um <- sample_info_trap %>%
 # mutate(H_index_UM = h_index / h_um_baseline) %>%
  #group_by(line) %>%
  #summarise(mean_H_UM = mean(H_index_UM))


#h_summary <- sample_info_trap %>%
#  group_by(trt) %>%
#  summarise(
#    mean_h = mean(h_index),
#    se_h = sd(h_index) / sqrt(n()),
#    n = n(),
#    .groups = "drop") %>%
#  mutate(
#    baseline = mean_h[trt == "UM"],  # Store 35S value
#    H_index = mean_h / baseline) %>%
#  select(-baseline)  # Clean up

#print(" Raw H-index (H/IM/UM):")
#print(h_summary)
#print("UM-baseline H-index (H vs UM):")
#print(h_summary_um)

# Export key results
#write_csv(h_summary, file.path(tables_dir, "HAUSTORIA_INDEX.csv"))
#write_csv(sample_info_trap, file.path(tables_dir, "TRAP_METADATA.csv"))
```
